name: Chewy Oatmeal Raisin Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat together the brown sugar and margarine until blended.
3. Add apple butter, egg whites, milk, and vanilla; beat well.
4. Add combined flour, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt; mix well.
5. Stir in oats and raisins; mix well. The dough will be moist.
6. Spread the dough in a greased 13-by-9-inch baking dish.
7. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until light brown. Cool before cutting into bars.
